scripts.dev:frontend:all: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=frontend/donor-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend/ngo-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend/admin-panel"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=backend/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/matching-service" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/food-service" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/delivery-service" "npm run start --workspace=backend/ai-service"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend/donor-dashboard && npm run build --workspace=frontend/ngo-dashboard && npm run build --workspace=frontend/admin-panel
